notes: US-based specialty ingredients company with strong expertise in mineral UV filters and cosmetic pigments. Sensient Technologies offers zinc oxide and titanium dioxide dispersions in both water-dispersible and oil-dispersible grades, with surface-treated options for improved aesthetics and reduced whitening effect. Their integrated color and UV protection expertise makes them a unique supplier for cosmetics requiring both pigmentation and sun protection.
